title: VDM Consumption View — final layer for Fiori / Analytics
description: VDM Consumption View — final layer for Fiori / Analytics

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_VDMCON'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - VDM Consumption View (C_* pattern)'
@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@Analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE
@ObjectModel.dataType: #CUBE
@OData.publish: true
@OData.entitySet.name: 'TravelAnalytics'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_VDM_CONSUME
  as select from ZPRAC_CDS_VDM_BASIC
{
  key TravelId,
      AgencyId,
      CustomerId,
      @Semantics.date: true
      BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      TotalPrice,
      CurrencyCode,
      Description,
      Status,
      @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
      Createdby,
      @Semantics.date: true
      Createdat,
      @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
      Lastchangedby,
      @Semantics.date: true
      Lastchangedat
}
